description: Form builder templates pipeline with three-gate validation. T637 TemplateSchemaValidator: JSON Schema validation at ORDER 1, required field enforcement at ORDER 2, type compatibility at ORDER 3. T638 TemplateVersionPublisher: OCC DRAFT→PUBLISHED at ORDER 1, version immutability at ORDER 2, schema evolution check at ORDER 3. T639 TemplateInstantiationEngine: SETNX lock at ORDER 1, variable binding at ORDER 2, default merge at ORDER 3, redis.del in finally. T640 TemplateUsageAnalytics: append-only metrics, PII exclusion, popularity scoring.

n1.label: ValidateTemplateRequest
n1.description: Validate template submission: templateId present; schema valid JSON; requiredFields defined

n2.label: RetrieveValidationPatterns
n2.description: RAG retrieval of schema validation + publication + instantiation patterns from FLOW-23

n3.label: DecomposeValidationPlan
n3.description: Decompose validation into ordered steps: JSON Schema validation → required field enforcement → type compatibility

n4.label: GenerateSchemaValidator
n4.description: AI generates T637 with three-gate validation: JSON Schema at ORDER 1, required fields at ORDER 2, type compatibility at ORDER 3. Also generates T638 with OCC publication + immutability guard + evolution check. T639 with SETNX lock + binding + defaults. T640 with append-only metrics + PII exclusion.

n5.label: ValidateImplementation
n5.description: Validate JSON Schema at ORDER 1, required field enforcement at ORDER 2, type compatibility at ORDER 3, audit before enqueue (DNA-8), OCC publication, version immutability, SETNX lock, PII exclusion

n6.label: ScoreImplementation
n6.description: Score: JSON Schema validation order compliance, required field enforcement, type compatibility, OCC publish, immutability guard, SETNX lock, redis.del in finally, PII exclusion, audit before enqueue

n8.label: StoreFeedback
n8.description: DPO triple: chosen=JSON-Schema-ORDER1+required-fields-ORDER2+type-compatibility-ORDER3+OCC-DRAFT-PUBLISHED+SETNX-lock+redis.del-in-finally+PII-exclusion+append-only-metrics, rejected=schema-not-validated OR required-check-after-type OR OCC-missing OR immutability-after-write OR lock-without-redis.del OR user-values-in-metrics
n8.discriminatingConstraint: Missing JSON Schema validation at ORDER 1 OR required field check after type compatibility OR non-OCC publication OR immutability check after write OR SETNX lock missing OR redis.del missing in finally OR user input values in metrics receives score=0 and triggers n3 re-iteration. CF-23-1..4.
